mapper.select:
SELECT t.task_id, t.task_name, t.creator AS creatorId, t.creation_time, t.project_id, t.simulation_stage, t.type, t.compute_resource, t.status, t.server_id, t.server_name, t.priority, t.cpu_core_need, t.memory_need, t.progress, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.error_msg, u.username AS creator FROM mod_tasks t LEFT JOIN mod_users u ON t.creator = u.user_id LEFT JOIN mod_projects p ON t.project_id = p.project_id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.project_status = 0
AND ( t.task_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY t.creation_time DESC

SELECT t.task_id, t.task_name, t.creator AS creatorId, t.creation_time, t.project_id, t.simulation_stage, t.type, t.status, t.compute_resource, t.server_id, t.server_name, t.priority, t.cpu_core_need, t.memory_need, t.progress, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.error_msg, u.username AS creator FROM mod_tasks t LEFT JOIN mod_users u ON t.creator = u.user_id LEFT JOIN mod_projects p ON t.project_id = p.project_id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.project_status = 1
AND ( t.task_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY t.creation_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mod_tasks t WHERE t.`type` = #{type} AND t.status IN ('running', '仿真中')

SELECT t.task_id, t.task_name, t.creator AS creatorId, t.creation_time, t.project_id, t.simulation_stage, t.type, t.status, t.compute_resource, t.server_id, t.server_name, t.priority, t.cpu_core_need, t.memory_need, t.progress, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.error_msg, u.username AS creator FROM mod_tasks t LEFT JOIN mod_users u ON t.creator = u.user_id
t.status IN ('pending', '未启动')
AND t.`type` = #{type}
ORDER BY IFNULL(t.priority, 2) ASC, t.creation_time ASC
